description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a spread collar and a V-neckline, full buttoned placket, and a drawstring at the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required s.oliver shirt for the fashion-oriented career women. This shirt from s.oliver in white has an easy silhouette. Pair it with a pencil skirt or formal trousers, closed toe pumps and a vibrant scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
